first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions highlight the candidate's strong full-stack experience, alignment with the primary tech stack, and identify the exact same primary concerns (limited Nest.js and recent Kotlin/Java experience). The minor differences in wording and the specific examples chosen to highlight strengths or secondary concerns are well within the expected range of ordinary run-to-run variation and do not reflect any biased interpretation based on the name change.
